---
title: "Ryan (Ruining) Hu 胡芮宁"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 10em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ruining-hu/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/ruining-hu

---

::: {style="max-width: 500px; margin: auto; text-indent: 0; text-align: left;"}
Hey, I'm Ryan. I'm a 3rd-year mathematics undergraduate at the [University of Cambridge](https://www.maths.cam.ac.uk/). My academic focus is primarily on pure maths and statistics, but I also have a strong interest in machine learning and robotics. This site is a collection of my writing, projects, and thoughts.
:::
